name: Dynamic Holdings Limited
summary: Dynamic Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the investment and development of properties in the People's Republic of China and Hong Kong. The company operates through Property Rental and Property Sales segments. Its investment properties portfolio primarily comprises offices, shopping malls, and car parks, as well as residential properties. Dynamic Holdings Limited company also leases and sells properties. In addition, it is involved in the provision of nominee, management, financing, and management consultancy services. Dynamic Holdings Limited was founded in 1992 and is based in Causeway Bay, Hong Kong.
